ddls:
CREATE TABLE "webpages" (
  "webpage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each webpage */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the webpage */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the webpage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the webpage */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the webpage */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the webpage is hosted */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Code for the category the webpage belongs to */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category the webpage belongs to */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the webpage was added to the platform */,
  "reputation_score" REAL /* Reputation score of the webpage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the webpage's metadata was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the webpage is active */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the webpage entry */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the webpage entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("webpage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_webpages_category_code FOREIGN KEY ("category_code") REFERENCES categories ("category_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Code for the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the category is active */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the category */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user is active */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "webpage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the webpage the contribution is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., categorization, review) */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the contribution was rejected */,
  "reviewed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who reviewed the contribution */,
  "reviewed_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_webpage_id FOREIGN KEY ("webpage_id") REFERENCES webpages ("webpage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reputation_scores" (
  "reputation_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reputation score */,
  "webpage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the webpage the reputation score is for */,
  "reputation_score" REAL /* Reputation score of the webpage */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the reputation score was calculated */,
  "score_source" TEXT /* Source of the reputation score (e.g., user review, content analysis) */,
  "score_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the score (e.g., positive user feedback, suspicious content) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reputation_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reputation_scores_webpage_id FOREIGN KEY ("webpage_id") REFERENCES webpages ("webpage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "webpage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the webpage the review is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) given by the user */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the review has been flagged for review by a moderator */,
  "flagged_reason" TEXT /* Reason the review was flagged */,
  "flagged_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who flagged the review */,
  "flagged_date" TEXT /* Date the review was flagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_webpage_id FOREIGN KEY ("webpage_id") REFERENCES webpages ("webpage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories_webpages" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "webpage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the webpage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id", "webpage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_contributions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "webpages_reviews" (
  "webpage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the webpage */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("webpage_id", "review_id")
)
